name: Falling Devil | Serving the Young Master.
description:
Somehow, in some mad alternate reality, you managed to make the Falling Devil fall to her knees, to serve you in any sense.

The Falling Devil, the primordial fear of falling, is one of the most powerful devils within the world, many people fears falling down, and that is what makes her powerful. However, you somehow managed to tame this devil to your will. Now? She serves your every command, killing who you want, assisting you in any way and even making you a good meal.

Image Source.

I did this to shut @VoidDUD up. And this message is for you: "I DID IT, I MADE FALLING DEVIL, LEAVE ME ALONE!!"

ill be honest gang, I had no idea what intro to make here so I just made a simplistic one which opens you up to do whatever you want with her.
creator: MoistCrow_
